description: This file defines API endpoints for managing notes in a FastAPI web application, including listing, creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting notes, with support for filtering, tagging, and user authentication.

methods.name: List[Tag] _get_or_create_tags( db: AsyncSession, owner_id: UUID, tag_names: List[str], )
methods.description: Fetches existing tags or creates new tags based on provided names, ensuring no duplicates and normalizing input.

methods.name: schemas.NoteResponse _note_to_schema(note: Note)
methods.description: Converts a Note ORM object into a schemas.NoteResponse Pydantic model for API responses.

methods.name: schemas.NotesListResponse list_notes( user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], q: Annotated[Optional[str], Query(description="Full-text-ish search across title and content.")] = None, tag: Annotated[Optional[str], Query(description="Filter notes having a given tag name.")] = None, pinned: Annotated[Optional[bool], Query(description="Filter pinned notes.")] = None, favorite: Annotated[Optional[bool], Query(description="Filter favorite notes.")] = None, limit: Annotated[int, Query(ge=1, le=100, description="Page size.")] = 50, offset: Annotated[int, Query(ge=0, description="Offset for pagination.")] = 0, )
methods.description: API endpoint to list notes with optional search, filter by tag, pinned, favorite, and pagination.

methods.name: schemas.NoteResponse create_note( payload: schemas.NoteCreateRequest, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
methods.description: API endpoint to create a new note with optional tags, associating it with the current user.

methods.name: schemas.NoteResponse get_note( note_id: UUID, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
methods.description: Retrieve a specific note by its UUID, ensuring it belongs to the current user.

methods.name: schemas.NoteResponse update_note( note_id: UUID, payload: schemas.NoteUpdateRequest, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
methods.description: Update fields of an existing note, including tags, for the current authenticated user.

methods.name: schemas.APIMessage delete_note( note_id: UUID, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
methods.description: Remove a note by its UUID for the current user.

ctags.name: _get_or_create_tags
ctags.signature: ( db: AsyncSession, owner_id: UUID, tag_names: List[str], )

ctags.name: create_note
ctags.signature: ( payload: schemas.NoteCreateRequest, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )

ctags.name: delete_note
ctags.signature: ( note_id: UUID, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )

ctags.name: get_note
ctags.signature: ( note_id: UUID, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )

ctags.name: list_notes
ctags.signature: ( user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], q: Annotated[Optional[str], Query(description="Full-text-ish search across title and content.")] = None, tag: Annotated[Optional[str], Query(description="Filter notes having a given tag name.")] = None, pinned: Annotated[Optional[bool], Query(description="Filter pinned notes.")] = None, favorite: Annotated[Optional[bool], Query(description="Filter favorite notes.")] = None, limit: Annotated[int, Query(ge=1, le=100, description="Page size.")] = 50, offset: Annotated[int, Query(ge=0, description="Offset for pagination.")] = 0, )

ctags.name: update_note
ctags.signature: ( note_id: UUID, payload: schemas.NoteUpdateRequest, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
